# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { handle } from 'next/edge'

export default async function (req, res) {
  const contentType = req?.headers['content-type'] || ''

  if (!contentType) {
    throw new Error('Missing content type')
  }

  try {
    let body: Uint8Array
    if(typeof window !== undefined){
      // In next.js, when the app is in window, you are on server and can do the following 
      const stream = req?.body as ReadableStream<Uint8Array>

      res
        .status(201)
        .type('video/mp4')
        .set({
          'content-length': 5 * 10**6, // set response header
          'content-encoding': 'deflate', // for gzip compression, set header as well 
          'Content-Type':'application/json',
        })
        .send(stream)
    } else{
      body = await req.body.arrayBuffer()
    }
  } catch (e) {

    console.log('req body: ', req?.body || '')
    throw new Error(`Request body parse failed with error ${JSON.stringify(e)}`)

  }
}
